name: Miya twins | Yokai Spirit
description:
Haikyuu | Shrine spirit au ♡ Deity! {{user}}

"So this is the new land God? They look frail." "Right... so how are we supposed to help this useless human become a whole god then?"

Tldr; You are suddenly forced into

🂱 Tor Note 🂱

You can tell I've been watching Kamisama Kiss hehe so i was inspired to do a yokai au of the twins. I've made it quite open so you can create the story of how you ended up in this situation and also what deity you are. If you wanna follow a similar route to the anime you can definitely be the 'deity of matchmaking' also hah

but yeah basically if youve never watched the anime, some stranger gifts you his powers as god of the land and now youre forced to learn the ways of deity lol so take the rp from there however youd like

♡ ALT Scenarios ♡ feat. Miya twins

Stepbro! Au

You help them with rennovations

All bot scripts and initial messages are written by me! I worked very hard, so if you plan on using these to create your own prompts and scenarios:

PLEASE keep them only for PRIVATE use and DO NOT POST THEM

That's all I ask for /ᐠ╥ ˕ ╥;マ
